title: yalak #3212
definition:
1) to go, walk, come
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go, walk, come, depart, proceed, move, go away
        1a2) to die, live, manner of life (fig.)
    1b) (Hiphil) to lead, bring, lead away, carry, cause to walk
